title: albizia stipulata
intro: Albizia stipulata, also known as the East Indian walnut or Phialium tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Albizia stipulata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating skin conditions, among others. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural alternatives.
